mapper.sql: SELECT (${rn_top} / (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom})) AS pageNo , (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom}) AS pageSize , totalCount - (rowindx - 1) AS rrowindx , ROW_.* FROM (

SELECT a.rownum_ rowindx , b.TOTAL_COUNT totalCount , a.AUTH_ID authId , a.AUTH_KOR_NAME authKorName , a.AUTH_ENG_NAME authEngName , a.AUTH_COMMENT authComment , a.USE_YN useYn , a.REG_YMD regYmd FROM ( SELECT (@rownum := @rownum + 1) AS rownum_ , AUTH_ID , AUTH_KOR_NAME , AUTH_ENG_NAME , AUTH_COMMENT , USE_YN , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS REG_YMD FROM STB_B_AUTH_MNG JOIN (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE 1 = 1
AND AUTH_ID LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( AUTH_KOR_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') OR AUTH_ENG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') )
AND AUTH_COMMENT LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( AUTH_ID LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') OR ( AUTH_KOR_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') OR AUTH_ENG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') ) OR AUTH_COMMENT LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') )
ORDER BY AUTH_ID ASC ) a JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM STB_B_AUTH_MNG WHERE 1 = 1
AND AUTH_ID LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( AUTH_KOR_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') OR AUTH_ENG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') )
AND AUTH_COMMENT LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( AUTH_ID LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') OR ( AUTH_KOR_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') OR AUTH_ENG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') ) OR AUTH_COMMENT LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyword},'%') )
) b ON 1 = 1
mapper.select: /* on.standard.system.auth.selAuthView */ SELECT AUTH_ID authId , AUTH_KOR_NAME authKorName , AUTH_ENG_NAME authEngName , AUTH_COMMENT authComment , USE_YN useYn , IS_DEL_ABLE isDelAble , FN_S_USER_INFO(REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') regUserNm , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') regYmd , TEMPCOL_1 tempCol1, TEMPCOL_2 tempCol2, TEMPCOL_3 tempCol3, TEMPCOL_4 tempCol4, TEMPCOL_5 tempCol5 , TEMPCOL_6 tempCol6, TEMPCOL_7 tempCol7, TEMPCOL_8 tempCol8, TEMPCOL_9 tempCol9, TEMPCOL_10 tempCol10 FROM STB_B_AUTH_MNG WHERE AUTH_ID = #{authId}
/* on.standard.system.auth.selectAuthList */ SELECT AUTH_ID authId , AUTH_KOR_NAME authKorName FROM STB_B_AUTH_MNG WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY AUTH_ID
